data.title: Web3 breaches lead to $464M losses in Q1 with 43 incidents; phishing main driver as regulators demand tighter security.
data.description: According to the Q1 2026 report by Hacken, a total of $464.5 million was lost in 43 incidents. The losses were primarily driven by phishing attacks, legacy code bugs, and key compromises. The increasing security demands from regulators have also played a role in these incidents.

data.title: Jacobs to hold its fiscal second quarter 2026 earnings conference call and webcast
data.description: Dallas-based company Jacobs (NYSE: J) is set to reveal its fiscal second quarter earnings for 2026 post-market on May 5, 2026. A conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day will feature management presenting the company's results and operating trends. The call can be accessed through a webcast and slides at jacobs.com. Jacobs is known for pushing boundaries to shape the future and is committed to innovation.

data.title: AAA 2026 Session to Spotlight Audiologist-Directed Vestibular Diagnostics and Treatment
data.description: A cutting-edge approach to vestibular care is being highlighted by experts in Newport Beach, California. On April 14, 2026, Newport-Mesa Audiology Balance & Ear Institute and Dizziland, Inc. announced a collaborative effort to showcase an integrated vestibular care model aimed at improving patient outcomes and enhancing practice performance. This innovative clinical session will be led by audiologists, emphasizing a patient-centered approach to address balance and ear issues. The collaboration signifies the importance of incorporating specialized care strategies for optimal results.

data.title: CarMax Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: CarMax, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on February 28, 2026. One notable highlight was the appointment of Keith Barr as President and CEO, effective March 16, 2026. The total combined sales of retail and wholesale units reached 303,969, reflecting a modest increase of 0.7%. However, retail used unit sales saw a decrease of 0.8%, with comparable store used unit sales dropping by 1.9%. The gross profit per retail used unit was reported at $2,115, showing a decline compared to the previous year's record.

data.title: Bitcoin approaches $75,000 with improving market sentiment and geopolitical factors, as analysts remain optimistic.
data.description: As Bitcoin continues its climb towards the $75,000 mark, there has been a decrease in bearish options flow. The rise in spot buying activity has contributed to this push, leading analysts to have a slightly bullish outlook on the cryptocurrency's trajectory.

JPMORGAN REPORTS Q1 NET INTEREST INCOME OF USD 25.5 BILLION. AVERAGE LOANS ROSE 11% YEAR-OVER-YEAR AND 2% QUARTER-OVER-QUARTER. AVERAGE DEPOSITS INCREASED 7% YEAR-OVER-YEAR AND 1% QUARTER-OVER-QUARTER.

JPMORGAN'S Q1 REVENUE REACHED USD 49.836 BILLION, BEATING ESTIMATES OF USD 49.169 BILLION. RETURN ON CAPITAL EMPLOYED (ROCE) WAS 19%. CREDIT LOSS PROVISION FOR Q1 WAS USD 2.507 BILLION. EARNINGS PER SHARE (EPS) STOOD AT USD 5.94, WITH A NET INCOME OF USD 16.494 BILLION.

data.title: Pentair to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings and Host Investor Conference Call on April 28
data.description: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) will be releasing its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. They are a leading company in the sustainable water movement sector. A conference call with investors is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Presentation materials will be available on the company's website (www.pentair.com) prior to the call.
